project: Coco y Mango Games - Final Batch
description: Implement games 11-13 for the Coco y Mango mini-games platform

stories.title: Game 11: El día de San Patricio (Hidden Object)
acceptance_criteria: Hidden object gameplay - find Patricio hiding in scene
Multiple scenes (plaza, mercado, parque) with hiding spots
Two phases: find Patricio, then find the clover ☘️
Hint system (3 hints available, makes target glow)

stories.title: Game 12: La aventura al aeropuerto (Time Pressure)
acceptance_criteria: Tap to jump, swipe down to slide, swipe L/R to dodge
Bus visible at end, starts leaving at 10 seconds
Screen pulses red when time is low

stories.title: Game 13: El boleto número 13 (Chase/Catch)
acceptance_criteria: Ticket floats and darts around screen unpredictably
Tap to catch - must tap precisely on ticket
Wind gusts push ticket in random directions
Near-miss causes ticket to zoom away
Coco/Mango visible at bottom, react to catches
